wheels.title: 领域的完成度

wheels.title: 领域主要效果
wheels.sourceNote: User-confirmed main domain effect pool. 规则类 can only appear here and is not present in the attached-effect pool.

sourceNote: JJK wheel 1.21 candidate: selected low-risk profile/flavor modules from 20260424-122432 source; 20260427-120020 batch-1 supplement added low-risk family and event participation gates; 20260424-122432 batch-2 added low-risk organization and high-school profile gates; 20260424-122432 batch-3 added great-family status as neutral profile context; 20260424-122432 batch-4 added underground casino role as neutral organization context; user-confirmed heavenly restriction split added concrete type gate; user-confirmed high-council gate added W177/W178; base attribute runtime draw weights are overridden by strength-v0.2-candidate.json baseAttributeRankWeights.
